allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; lines=[l for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; d=json.loads\(lines[-1]\) if lines else {}; print\(d.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)[:200] if isinstance\(d.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\),str\) else str\(d.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)\)[:200]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; lines=[l for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; d=json.loads\(lines[-1]\) if lines else {}; c=d.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\); print\(\(c if isinstance\(c,str\) else str\(c\)\)[:300]\)")
